message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    ParticipantBorderColor #CCCCCC
    ParticipantPadding 10
    BoxPadding 10
}

box "RTP" #LightGray
    participant "RtpSenderEgress" as RtpSenderEgress
    participant "ModuleRtpRtcpImpl" as ModuleRtpRtcpImpl
    participant "PacketRouter" as PacketRouter
    participant "ProcessThreadImpl" as ProcessThreadImpl
    participant "PacingController" as PacingController
    participant "PacedSender" as PacedSender
    participant "RTPSender" as RTPSender
    participant "RTPSenderAudio" as RTPSenderAudio
end box

box "Call" #LightGray
    participant "AudioCodingModuleImpl" as AudioCodingModuleImpl
    participant "ChannelReceive" as ChannelReceive
    participant "ChannelSend" as ChannelSend
    participant "AcmReceiver" as AcmReceiver
end box

box "NetEq" #LightGray
    participant "AudioSendStream" as AudioSendStream
    participant "AudioMixerImpl" as AudioMixerImpl
    participant "AudioTransportImpl" as AudioTransportImpl
end box

box "Audio" #LightGray
    participant "AudioDeviceBuffer" as AudioDeviceBuffer
    participant "AudioTrackJni" as AudioTrackJni
    participant "AudioRecordJni" as AudioRecordJni
end box

== Audio Recording Flow ==
AudioRecordJni->>AudioTrackJni: DataIsRecorded()
AudioTrackJni->>AudioDeviceBuffer: DeliverRecordedData()
AudioDeviceBuffer->>AudioTransportImpl: RecordedDataIsAvailable()
AudioTransportImpl->>AudioMixerImpl: SendAudioData()
AudioMixerImpl->>ChannelSend: ProcessAndEncodeAudio()

== Audio Encoding and Sending Flow ==
ChannelSend->>AudioCodingModuleImpl: Add10MsData()
activate AudioCodingModuleImpl
    AudioCodingModuleImpl->>AudioCodingModuleImpl: Encode()
    AudioCodingModuleImpl->>ChannelSend: SendData()
deactivate AudioCodingModuleImpl
ChannelSend->>ChannelSend: SendRtpAudio()
ChannelSend->>RTPSenderAudio: SendAudio()
RTPSenderAudio->>RTPSender: SendToNetwork()
RTPSender->>PacedSender: EnqueuePackets()

== RTP Packet Processing and Sending Flow ==
PacedSender->>ProcessThreadImpl: Process()
activate ProcessThreadImpl
    ProcessThreadImpl->>PacingController: Process()
    activate PacingController
        PacingController->>PacingController: ProcessPackets()
        PacingController->>RTPSender: SendRtpPacket()
    deactivate PacingController
deactivate ProcessThreadImpl
RTPSender->>PacketRouter: SendPacket()
PacketRouter->>ModuleRtpRtcpImpl: TrySendPacket()
ModuleRtpRtcpImpl->>RtpSenderEgress: SendPacket()
activate RtpSenderEgress
    RtpSenderEgress->>RtpSenderEgress: SendPacketToNetwork()
deactivate RtpSenderEgress

@enduml
```
